worlds.name: Kharaba Border Zone
worlds.description: 10-district frontier region along a contested international border. Peacekeeping unit pre-positioning against hostile agitation, communications outage, and economic shock scenarios.
worlds.world_context: Kharaba Border Zone — a frontier region of 10 districts along a contested international border. The central government maintains partial control. Peripheral districts are influenced by cross-border actors.

worlds.name: San Francisco Blackout (2026)
worlds.description: 8-zone citywide power outage across real SF neighborhoods and infrastructure. 72-hour cascading crisis involving PG&E, SFPD, BART, hospitals, community organizers, and opportunists.
worlds.world_context: San Francisco, California — a dense urban city of 875,000 people experiencing a major infrastructure crisis. Multiple agencies, community networks, and private actors compete to restore order, utility services, and public trust during a cascading blackout.
